prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第42名，较2025年第44名上升2位，排名稳中有升，对考生吸引力增强；2022年曾因校园安全事件出现偏负面舆情，但近三年声誉平稳；抖音热度评价为"较热"，总排名第34位，短视频曝光量处于中上水平；无投档断档记录；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、化学A-、控制科学与工程A-，化工领域实力突出，与该校招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息类、机械类等工科专业社会热度持续较高；宁夏2026年物理类考生约4.42万人，与2025年基本持平；华东理工大学位于上海，对宁夏考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在宁夏招生规模较小（约24人），招生占比极低，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2448名、2026年计划缩招（竞争缓解使位次前移）与软科排名上升（吸引更多考生使竞争略增）的相互对冲；预测最低位次约2300名，区间1955–2645名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类
- 机械类（机械智能化实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（能源与环境）
- 工科试验班（智慧化工）
- 材料类（新材料实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（新工科化学实验班）
- 工科试验班（生物医药）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2300名，区间1955–2645名。位次在区间下限（1955名）以内可重点冲刺一档电子信息类、机械类；位次在区间中部（约2300名）建议以二档工科试验班（智慧化工/能源与环境）为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（2645名）附近建议以三档化学类、生物医药为主保底。华理化工A+实力突出，相关专业性价比高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking fluctuated significantly: approximately 3599 → 2068 → 3318 → 2448, showing a volatile trend in recent years; the 2025 baseline is about 2448th place; the provincial enrollment plan was 22 students each year from 2022 to 2024, increased to 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24 students, a reduction of 3 students (-11.1%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, up 2 places from 44th in 2025, showing a steady rise and increasing attractiveness to candidates; in 2022, there was a somewhat negative public opinion due to a campus safety incident, but the reputation has been stable in the past three years; Douyin heat evaluation is 'relatively hot', ranking 34th overall, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; no record of enrollment gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in the country), Chemistry is A-, Control Science and Engineering is A-, with outstanding strength in the chemical engineering field, highly relevant to the university's enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information and Mechanical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; Ningxia's 2026 physics category candidates are approximately 44,200, roughly the same as in 2025; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Ningxia is relatively small (about 24 students), with a very low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2448th, the 2026 enrollment reduction (easing competition, moving rankings forward) and the rise in Soft Science ranking (attracting more candidates, slightly increasing competition) offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2300th, with a range of 1955 to 2645.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information Class
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Intelligence Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Energy and Environment)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering)
- Materials Class (New Materials Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry Class (New Engineering Chemistry Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biomedicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 2300th, with a range of 1955 to 2645. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (1955th) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Electronic Information and Mechanical Engineering; those around the middle (approximately 2300th) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering/Energy and Environment) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit (2645th) are advised to rely on Tier 3 Chemistry and Biomedicine as safety options. ECUST's Chemical Engineering A+ strength is outstanding, and related majors offer high cost-effectiveness.

_translation.university_name_en: East China University of Science and Technology
